title: smith-event envelope (training-data-plan.md §3.1)
description: Append-only event-sourcing envelope carried by EVERY event. The execution-causality graph is a DAG over caused_by/depends_on ONLY; supersedes is a correction edge and never enters that DAG. Ordering authority: sequence is monotonic per-engagement from one event-store authority; no causal parent may hold a greater committed sequence than its child.

sequence.description: Monotonic per-engagement, allocated by ONE event-store authority. Authoritative practical order.

supersedes.description: CORRECTION edge — NOT part of the execution-causality DAG (§3.1).

correlation_id.description: e.g. decision_id — links retries/results to their decision.
